mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, title, status, schema_version, current_version, content::text as content, cover_asset_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM editor_document WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, owner_id, title, status, schema_version, current_version, content::text as content, cover_asset_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM editor_document WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO editor_document (owner_id, title, status, schema_version, current_version, content) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{schemaVersion}, #{currentVersion}, cast(#{content} as jsonb))
